ohtani.title: Teoscar Hernández's six RBIs fuels Dodgers' 11-3 win
ohtani.blurb: Teoscar Hernández goes deep and collects six RBIs to lead the Dodgers to a 11-3 victory over the Brewers

imanaga.title: Yelich, Bauers combine for six RBI's in Brewers' win
imanaga.blurb: Christian Yelich and Jake Bauers each homer and combine for six RBI's, powering the Brewers to a 9-3 win

suzuki.title: Walker homers twice, Teng deals in Astros' 3-0 win
suzuki.blurb: Christian Walker crushes two homers and Kai-Wei Teng tosses six scoreless innings in the Astros' 3-0 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Taj Bradley returns, K's seven in Twins' win
yoshida.blurb: Taj Bradley strikes out seven in his return from injury and Trevor Larnach records four hits in the Twins' 4-2 win over the Red Sox

okamoto.title: Corbin's strong start leads Blue Jays to 5-2 win
okamoto.blurb: Patrick Corbin punches out seven while only allowing one run through six  to propel the Blue Jays to a 5-2 win over the Pirates

murakami.title: Harrison Bader, Willy Adames lift Giants to 10-3 win
murakami.blurb: Harrison Bader crushes a grand slam and Willy Adames hits a solo homer to lift the Giants to a 10-3 win over the White Sox

matsui.title: Ohtani's homer, four Ks propel Dodgers to 4-0 win
matsui.blurb: A gem by Shohei Ohtani, both at the plate with a home run, and on the mound secures a 4-0 shutout victory for the Dodgers over the Padres
